overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through a futuristic urban plaza. The scene features towering skyscrapers with neon signage, food vendors, palm trees, and scattered pedestrians in a bright, sunlit cyberpunk city environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian plaza with neon-lit food vendor

events.description: camera circles around the food cart examining the vendor's setup and neon menu

agents.ego_description: walking around the food cart, observing the vendor and examining the cart's neon-lit details

notable_agents.action: vendor in green tank top preparing food at the neon-lit cart
character with purple boots and black coat standing near the cart

entered.detail: food cart with red and yellow neon lighting and red umbrella
yellow building with large MIXX IT UP advertisement poster
tall dark building with white D logo and DELAMAIN signage
tall palm trees lining the pedestrian street

segments.scene_description: The player circles a neon-lit food cart in a sunlit cyberpunk plaza, examining the vendor's setup. The Delamain building towers in the background while a character in distinctive purple boots stands nearby. The camera moves around the cart, capturing the glowing menu and cooking equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with towering skyscrapers and overhead walkways

events.description: camera turns to face the Delamain building directly while walking
camera tilts upward to look at the tops of the skyscrapers against the blue sky

agents.ego_description: walking toward the Delamain building while looking up at the towering architecture and surrounding billboards

notable_agents.action: character with red hair and white top walking ahead toward the building

entered.detail: small kiosk structure with green NO FUTURE graffiti text on the side
elevated walkway connecting buildings with hanging advertisements

segments.scene_description: The player walks away from the food cart toward the massive Delamain building, passing a kiosk with NO FUTURE graffiti. The camera tilts up to admire the towering skyscrapers and overhead bridges. Other pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction through the open plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under building overpass with benches

events.description: entering the shaded covered area beneath the EL GUAPO sign and building overpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered plaza area with concrete benches and planters

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a concrete bench using a handheld device

entered.detail: large illuminated sign reading EL GUAPO on the building facade
concrete benches and large planters with people sitting

segments.scene_description: The player enters a shaded, covered walkway beneath the EL GUAPO sign. The lighting shifts to a mix of shadows and filtered sunlight. People sit on concrete benches along the path as the camera moves through this semi-enclosed space with building overpasses overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor dining area with seating and city overlook railing

events.description: exiting the covered area into the outdoor seating plaza with red chairs

agents.ego_description: walking past outdoor dining tables toward the railing overlooking the lower city level with steam vents

notable_agents.action: person in green shirt standing near the blue neon restaurant entrance

entered.detail: restaurant with bright blue neon signage and glass facade
red plastic chairs and tables arranged for outdoor dining
metal railing overlooking lower city level with industrial steam vents

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered walkway into an outdoor dining area with red chairs and tables. A restaurant with bright blue neon signage sits on the right. The camera continues toward a metal railing overlooking a lower level where industrial steam rises, with the Delamain building visible in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit cyberpunk plaza that transitions from an open urban square into a shaded walkway and finally toward an industrial overlook. It begins by circling a neon-lit food cart and its vendor, with the towering Delamain building looming in the background. As the camera moves away from the cart, it passes a graffiti-covered kiosk and tilts upward to capture the massive skyscrapers and overhead bridges before following other pedestrians across the open plaza. The scene then shifts into a shaded, covered walkway beneath an EL GUAPO sign, where filtered sunlight falls over people resting on concrete benches. Finally, the camera emerges from the shadows into an outdoor dining area with red chairs and blue neon signage, moving toward a metal railing where industrial steam rises from a lower level.
